english: Actions speak louder than words.
The early bird catches the worm.
Practice makes perfect.
Every journey begins with a single step.
Knowledge is power.
Time is money.
Where there is a will, there is a way.
A friend in need is a friend indeed.
Better late than never.
arabic: أن تأتي متأخراً خير من ألا تأتي أبداً.

english: When in Rome, do as the Romans do.
arabic: إذا كنت في روما، تصرف كالرومان.

english: Don't judge a book by its cover.
arabic: لا تحكم على الكتاب من غلافه.

english: Honesty is the best policy.
The pen is mightier than the sword.
Rome wasn't built in a day.
arabic: لم تُبنَ روما في يوم واحد.

english: When life gives you lemons, make lemonade.
arabic: عندما تعطيك الحياة ليموناً، اصنع عصير ليمون.

english: No pain, no gain.
Two heads are better than one.
Failure is the mother of success.
You miss 100% of the shots you don't take.
arabic: تفقد 100% من الفرص التي لا تحاول فيها.

english: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
arabic: الطريقة الوحيدة للقيام بعمل عظيم هي أن تحب ما تفعله.

english: Could you please help me with this?
arabic: هل يمكنك مساعدتي في هذا، من فضلك؟

english: I would like to make a reservation.
How much does this cost?
Excuse me, where is the nearest hospital?
I am looking forward to meeting you.
It was a pleasure meeting you.
Can you speak more slowly, please?
arabic: هل يمكنك التحدث ببطء أكثر، من فضلك؟

english: I completely agree with you.
What time does the meeting start?
Thank you for your hospitality.
I need to improve my English skills.
arabic: أحتاج لتحسين مهاراتي في اللغة الإنجليزية.

english: Reading books expands your mind.
Education is the key to success.
Hard work always pays off.
Never give up on your dreams.
Patience is a virtue.
Health is wealth.
The weather is beautiful today.
I enjoy learning new languages.
What do you do for a living?
I would like a cup of coffee, please.
Could you give me directions to the airport?
arabic: هل يمكنك إعطائي الاتجاهات إلى المطار؟

english: Teamwork makes the dream work.
Believe in yourself and you will succeed.
Experience is the best teacher.
A smile is the universal language.
Stay positive and good things will happen.
Respect is earned, not given.
The best investment is in yourself.
Success is not final, failure is not fatal.
arabic: النجاح ليس نهائياً، والفشل ليس قاتلاً.

english: I am grateful for everything I have.
Learning never exhausts the mind.
Opportunities don't happen, you create them.
Be the change you wish to see in the world.
arabic: كن التغيير الذي تريد أن تراه في العالم.

english: Life is short, make it sweet.
